section1.heading: [W]Download and complete the spreadsheet template
section1.p1: [W]Download the spreadsheet template or use you own if it follows the same format.
section1.p3: [W]If you are uploading your own file, you must include all of the following mandatory columns in your header row, using the exact spelling shown:

section3.heading: [W]Upload spreadsheet
section3.p1: [W]Select 'Choose file', browse to your saved spreadsheet and select it.

additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.invalidFileSize: [W]The file size must be less than 5MB
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.invalidFileFormat: [W]The selected file must be an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx or .xls)
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.backEndError: [W]Backend error occurred while processing the file. Please try again later.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.fileEmpty: [W]The uploaded file is empty. Upload a file with data.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.noDataRows: [W]The uploaded file does not contain any data rows. Please upload a file with data.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.dataRowsExceedsMax: [W]The uploaded file has exceeded the maximum of {{errorValue}} rows.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.multipleErrorTypesSummary: [W]There are {{errorValue}} errors over {{errorValue2}} rows within the uploaded file.
